member.name: M:MVIDCodeReaderNet.MVIDCodeReader.MVID_CR_SaveImage_NET(MVIDCodeReaderNet.MVIDCodeReader.MVID_IMAGE_INFO@,MVIDCodeReaderNet.MVIDCodeReader.MVID_IMAGE_TYPE,MVIDCodeReaderNet.MVIDCodeReader.MVID_IMAGE_INFO@,System.UInt32)

member.name: M:MVIDCodeReaderNet.MVIDCodeReader.MVID_CR_GetImageFileData_NET(System.String,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: ch:读取图片文件，转换为MVID_IMAGE_MONO8格式，可用于MVID_CR_Process | en:Read image file, convert to MVID_IMAGE_MONO8 format, can be used for MVID_CR_Process

member.remarks: ch:支持Raw、Bmp、Jpeg格式图片，Raw图片需要传入宽、高及像素格式(Mono8/BGR24) | en:Support Raw, Bmp, Jpeg format image, Raw image require incoming width, height, and pixel format(Mono8/BGR24)
